description: Leading engineering across a growing UK bank, scaling high-performing teams and embedding AI safely within a heavily regulated environment.

My previous role in International Sports was recently expanded to cover all frontend squads across the tribe as we scaled up to meet increased demand for delivery. My team now includes 6 squads with 8 direct reports and an organisation of over 30 Engineers.

I joined SkyBet as Lead Software Engineer for their Customer Integration team. We were responsible for multiple mission critical services so there was a particular focus on strong operational engineering practices. This involved a focus on logging, monitoring and alerting to ensure we could support our systems when on-call. As the Lead I managed all the engineers in the squad, helping them with their personal development and mentoring them to help them grow. I also worked very closely with our Product Manager to define and populate our roadmap.

I was responsible for all technical operations within the business. This included managing three teams; two Scrum teams developing a ground up rebuild of our ticketing platforms Event Genius & Ticket Arena, and one Kanban team supporting BAU changes. My main responsibilities were recruitment, line management, technical design and engineering strategy, but during my time here I also helped out as interim Scrum Master and PO, setup builds, deployments, monitoring & infrastructure, and was the last line of support.

I returned to Blacklight as their Technical Lead for the product development team where I was responsible for their internal products. These products were built using a variety of platforms including ASP.NET, SharePoint, Dynamics CRM & PHP. We also developed apps for iOS & Android. This role was my first introduction to leadership, working closely with the Technical Director as the most experienced Engineer in the company. I took on line management and recruitment responsibilities whilst helping define our ways of working as a company.

At HH Global I was a key member of the core development team, driving forward the businesses core system HHub2. HHub2 was built on top of ASP.NET MVC 3, EF5 and SQL Server. I was responsible for picking up user stories and bugs from the backlog, discussing them with a BA, developing a solution and handing over to an outsourced test team.

Blacklight was where I really cut my teeth as an Engineer. Working at a consultancy there isn’t any room for error, you have to learn quickly and react to your clients’ needs. This was where I learnt the importance of adaptability; whether in analysis, design, development, onsite support or providing training for other team members.
